Name: KNOCKBACK_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the parameters relating to knockback.

Fields.Name: Animation: Minimum - Duration
Fields.Description: Set the duration of the animation used for tiny damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Small - Duration
Fields.Description: Set the duration of the animation used for small damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Medium - Duration
Fields.Description: Set the duration of the animation used for medium damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Heavy - Duration
Fields.Description: Set the duration of the animation used for heavy damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Small Blow-off - Duration
Fields.Description: Set the duration of the animation used for small blow-off damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Heavy Blow-off - Duration
Fields.Description: Set the duration of the animation used during the big blow damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Strike - Duration
Fields.Description: Set the duration of the animation used for slamming damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Uppercut - Duration
Fields.Description: Set the duration of the animation used for launch damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Push - Duration
Fields.Description: Set the duration of the animation used for push damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Breath - Duration
Fields.Description: Set the duration of the animation used for breath damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Headshot - Duration
Fields.Description: Set the duration of the animation used for headshot damage hit.

Fields.Name: Guard Animation: Small - Duration
Fields.Description: Set the duration of the animation used for small damage hit when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Animation: Heavy - Duration
Fields.Description: Set the duration of the animation used for heavy damage hit when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Animation: Very Heavy - Duration
Fields.Description: Set the duration of the animation used for very heavy damage hit when guarding.

Fields.Name: Guard Animation: Break - Duration
Fields.Description: Set the duration of the animation used for guard break hit when guarding.

Fields.Name: Animation: Minimum - Stop Delay
Fields.Description: Set the deceleration duration to stop for minimal damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Small - Stop Delay
Fields.Description: Set the deceleration duration to stop for small damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Medium - Stop Delay
Fields.Description: Set the deceleration duration to stop for medium damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Heavy - Stop Delay
Fields.Description: Set the deceleration duration to stop for heavy damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Small Blow-off - Stop Delay
Fields.Description: Set the deceleration duration to stop for small blow-off damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Heavy Blow-off - Stop Delay
Fields.Description: Set the deceleration duration to stop for heavy blow-off damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Strike - Stop Delay
Fields.Description: Set the deceleration duration to stop for strike damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Uppercut - Stop Delay
Fields.Description: Set the deceleration duration to stop for uppercut damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Push - Stop Delay
Fields.Description: Set the deceleration duration to stop for push damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Breath - Stop Delay
Fields.Description: Set the deceleration duration to stop for breath damage hit.

Fields.Name: Animation: Headshot - Stop Delay
Fields.Description: Set the deceleration duration to stop for headshot damage hit.

Fields.Name: Guard Animation: Small - Stop Delay
Fields.Description: Set the deceleration duration to stop for small damage hit when guarding

Fields.Name: Guard Animation: Heavy - Stop Delay
Fields.Description: Set the deceleration duration to stop for heavy damage hit when guarding

Fields.Name: Guard Animation: Very Heavy - Stop Delay
Fields.Description: Set the deceleration duration to stop for very heavy damage hit when guarding

Fields.Name: Guard Animation: Break - Stop Delay
Fields.Description: Set the deceleration duration to stop for guard break damage hit when guarding
